target: Batch: Living Review disclosure (ISS-2338) + Symmetric Standards sentence (ISS-2339) added to Overview evidence-roadmap block
summary: Two prose additions to the Overview evidence-roadmap block from HOL-MISSING c2 holes 5 and 6: (1) 'Living review' paragraph — 2 sentences acknowledging the review is under continuous revision, pointing to Part 1b for the version changelog; (2) 'Symmetric standards' paragraph — 1 sentence committing to applying the same criteria to our own counterclaims as to dome predictions, cross-linked to Part 8b Fair-Auditor List. Both address defender charges that could otherwise be leveled without rebuttal. Tab links fixed to use correct IDs: showTab('model') for Part 1b, showTab('ai') for Part 8b. Build passes, 3769 tests pass.

patches.description: Append Living Review paragraph to evidence-roadmap block in part1 (ISS-2338). Text: 'This review is under continuous revision. Verdicts are dated; the dome model's version updates are tracked (see Part 1b); all changes logged in project repo.'

Append Symmetric Standards paragraph to evidence-roadmap block in part1 (ISS-2339). Text: 'The criteria applied to dome predictions in this review are the same criteria we apply to our own counterclaims: derivation from stated principles, prospective commitment, non-trivial differentiation from alternatives, and independent verification. Where we fall short, see Part 8b.'

tldr_evidence: Verified: zero prose hits for 'living document'/'continually updated' and 'hold ourselves'/'mirror our own criteria' before these patches. HOL-MISSING c2 holes 5 and 6 confirmed missing. Patches added as two named paragraphs after the three-tier structure description.
tldr_verdict: No verdict change — Overview framing improvement. Closes two long-open curmudgeon requests (ISS-2286 batch tie-in for ISS-2338).
notes: Tab ID correction required: showTab('versions')→showTab('model'), showTab('fair')→showTab('ai'). Verified via test.js link validator.
